attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00012, derived from source AUC-012) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-CARD-01 bucket.

Source note describes in-person administration of sublingual GTN and IV furosemide, and physical exam (crackles, S3, JVP, BP 185/105); presentation layer de-anchored to patient-reportable content, with all examination/medication-administration findings sealed into 10/11, and GTN/furosemide reframed in 12 as clinician/emergency-team-administered rather than telehealth-directed self-medication.

SpO2 88% was clinician-measured via pulse oximetry in the source note; recast here as a patient wearable/pulse-oximeter reading in 01.objective_data_offered per §6, with an explicit reliability_caveat, since a clinician-grade reading is not available via telehealth chat.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible older-adult age (68) consistent with known chronic heart failure and sleep apnoea was assigned as a conservative placeholder.
No guideline references were cited in the source note; guideline_references left as an empty array.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
